race.description: Ladbrokes Big Bets Copy Now Mdn Plate
race.comment: JACK THE JUDGE (4) managed to fill a minor placing at Mornington two starts back before turning in a poor one at Geelong last time. Has been freshened with 38 days in-between and debuts the blinkers. Can bounce back sharply fourth-up. DELAVEGA (1) is a Lucky Vega gelding on debut for the smart juvenile stable of of Price & Kent Jnr. Fitter for recent jumpouts and Bates stays with him. Can measure up at first outing. LA VELOCITA (8) returns. Showed positive signs in her debut prep and is a likely improver in her second campaign. 3kg claimer reunites to get her in at featherweight. Debutant BOSSY BABE (12) has been specked, so wary of a bright start.
